name: Watch_Dogs
notes: Living City mod by The Silver (thesilver.it / ModDB). Captured 2026-07-06 from Tony's working Windows install (mod files dated 2025-04-06). Loads via data_win64/patch.dat + patch.fat; Living_City_MOD_CONFIG.txt is Tony's tuned config. patch.dat (274MB) exceeds GitHub's file limit so it ships as a release asset and downloads on first apply.
